    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ParquetWriteOptions
    ParquetWriteOptions.compression(String spec)
    Compression codec spec, passed verbatim to DataFusion.
    ParquetWriteOptions
    ParquetWriteOptions.singleFileOutput(boolean v)
    When true, write to a single file at the supplied path.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    DataFrame.writeParquet(String path, ParquetWriteOptions options)
    Materialize this DataFrame as Parquet at path with the supplied ParquetWriteOptions.
